# LoopTV

> TV-style random video player for lean-back browsing of curated channels.

## Product

- [Home](https://tv.significanthobbies.com/): Player

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://tv.significanthobbies.com/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://tv.significanthobbies.com/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://tv.significanthobbies.com/llms.txt)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase
